identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a unique, fusion-driven agricultural brand identity for Unik Biotech Research that blends scientific precision with organic warmth.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Biotech Lab aesthetics with traditional Indian farming warmth.
Content is King: Every product card tells a yield-improvement story.
Zoom In: Macro shots of healthy cells/leaves vs wide drone shots of fields.
Negative Space: Allow the user to breathe, like a open field.

theme_strategy.rationale: Agriculture and nature inherently align with light, sun-drenched aesthetics. Dark mode is reserved for 'High-Tech/Precision Ag' dashboards if needed, but the primary marketing site must be bright and organic.
theme_strategy.visual_mood: Sunlight, Healthy Soil, Scientific Clarity, Vibrant Growth.

usage.headings: Manrope, font-bold or font-extrabold, tight tracking (-0.02em). Expresses modern reliability.
usage.body: Inter, font-normal, relaxed leading (1.6). Ensures maximum readability for detailed product info.
usage.accents: Manrope, uppercase, wide tracking (0.1em) for labels (e.g., 'ISO 9001:2008').
usage.marathi: Noto Sans Devanagari for all Marathi text to ensure legibility and cultural connection.

primary.name: Unik Green
primary.usage: Primary buttons, key headings, active states.

background.name: Morning Mist
background.usage: Main page background. Avoid pure white #ffffff.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use p-8 to p-16 for section padding.
layout_strategy.alignment: Left align text for readability. Center align Hero headlines for impact.

buttons.primary: bg-green-800 text-white hover:bg-green-700 hover:scale-105 shadow-lg shadow-green-900/20

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 group hover:shadow-xl hover:border-green-200 hover:-translate-y-1
cards.product_card: Relative positioning. Image takes top 50%. Content bottom 50%. Hover reveals 'Enquire' button.

inputs.style: bg-gray-50 border-gray-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-green-500 rounded-lg h-12 px-4

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 border-b border-gray-100/50 supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/60

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.02) on solid backgrounds to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Colored shadows. Use shadow-green-900/10 instead of pure black shadows.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React icons. Use distinct weights (stroke-width={1.5}) for a technical feel.

motion.philosophy: Organic Growth. Elements should 'sprout' or 'unfold' rather than just slide.
motion.hover: scale-105 for images. Text color shift for links.
motion.scroll: Parallax effect on Hero Background. Staggered reveal for Product Grids.

hero.alt: Sunlight shining through bright green leaves - Hero Background
Happy Indian Farmer in field - Trust Section

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'react-i18next' or similar for Bilingual support logic.

Use 'Manrope' from Google Fonts. Add import to index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=Noto+Sans+Devanagari:wght@400;500;700&display=swap');
Create a 'LanguageSwitcher' component that toggles a context state.
Ensure all forms (Contact, Dealer Inquiry) use Shadcn form components with Zod validation.
The 'Dealer Locator' should ideally use a map library (Leaflet/React-Leaflet) or a well-styled list if API keys are missing. Mock the map visually if needed.
Products Page: Use a filterable Bento Grid (Category Filter buttons at top).
Do not use generic Lorem Ipsum where possible—use context-aware placeholders (e.g., 'Increases yield by 20%', 'Contains 98% Humic Acid').
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for text.
Interactive elements must have hover states.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and inputs.
Bilingual: Ensure text containers can expand for Marathi text (which often takes more vertical space).
